name: QA 1470
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1470

derived metric delta() not correct for unsigned metrics when the

value decreases



valgrind variant, see qa/1298 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: pmval



Copyright (c) 2021 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.
descriptionHtml:

derived metric delta() not correct for unsigned metrics when the

value decreases

valgrind variant, see qa/1298 for the non-valgrind variant
